steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Each dimension increases by 30%, so the scale factor per dimension is $1.3$. Area scales by the square of the linear scale factor: $(1.3)^2 = 1.69$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Multiply the original area by the scale factor: $2{,}800 \times 1.69 = 4{,}732$ square inches.
